name: uiux-design-team
description: Comprehensive UI/UX design team simulation with 10 specialized agents covering the full design lifecycle. Includes user research with personas and JTBD, information architecture, interaction design, visual design with Claude's frontend-design aesthetic guidance, motion design, design systems with token architecture and component libraries, accessibility auditing with WCAG 2.2 compliance, UX writing, responsive design, CSS architecture, frontend component patterns for React/Vue/Svelte, usability evaluation with Nielsen's heuristics, design philosophies including Gestalt principles and emotional design, design case studies, user journey mapping, A/B testing strategy, design handoff, and design review orchestration.
